title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cashfree - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cashfree - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!
